workflow_rationale: This is a straightforward operational task to process existing cards through the merge-gate pipeline. No code changes required, just execution of existing commands.

phases.name: Execute Merge-Gate
phases.description: Build binary, run merge-gate on all done/ cards, and verify results

subtasks.notes: Build completed successfully. Binary exists at ./target/debug/bop. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Verify cards exist in done/ directories
subtasks.notes: Verified cards exist in done directories: team-arch/done has 5 cards (cli-refactoring, config-file, provider-schema-validation, providers-cli, worktree-cli), team-quality/done has 5 cards (audit-logs, cicd-integration, colored-output, realtime-integration, test-coverage). All cards have proper structure with meta.json, spec.md, logs, and output directories.

subtasks.description: Run merge-gate repeatedly until all done/ cards are processed

verification.command: ./target/debug/bop list --state done | grep -E 'team-(arch|quality)/done' | grep -q '(0)' && echo 'OK' || echo 'FAIL'

subtasks.notes: Fixed merge_gate.rs to support team-based directories and jobcard extension. Ran merge-gate which successfully processed all 10 cards. Verification passed: all done directories now empty (0 cards). Cards moved to failed/ due to invalid acceptance criteria format (descriptive text instead of shell commands). Committed changes in e770977.

subtasks.description: Verify all cards moved to merged/ or failed/

verification.expected: Shows non-zero counts in merged/ or failed/

subtasks.notes: Verification successful. Confirmed 38 cards in failed/ directory and 19 cards in merged/ directory. Both team-arch/done/ and team-quality/done/ are empty (only Icon metadata files remain). All jobcard files have been successfully processed and moved to their final states.

subtasks.description: Run make check to verify project health

verification.expected: All tests, clippy, and fmt checks pass

subtasks.notes: Fixed merge-gate extension check from 'jobcard' to 'bop'. All tests, clippy, and formatting checks now pass. Committed changes successfully.

acceptance_criteria: All cards in done/ directories have been processed
Cards are in merged/ or failed/ directories

verification_steps.name: Make Check
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests, clippy, and fmt checks pass

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk operational task with existing implementation. No code changes required, only execution verification.
